subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thou art in the House while the Sovereign of the House is in the hands of oppressors, and in such state from the horizon of the Prison I call unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله تو در بیت و سلطان بیت در دست ظالمین و در این حالت از افق سجن طالع و ترا ندا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
